title: component.yaml
description: The per-component pin file every Gibson component scaffolded by `gibson component init` ships. Records the kind (agent | tool | plugin), the component identity, and a small spec section read by gibson component validate / register / run.

apiVersion.description: Schema version. Currently the only supported value.

kind.description: Which Gibson component shape this directory implements.

image.description: Optional container image reference for build/deploy.

main_path.description: Path (relative to component.yaml) of the Go main package. Defaults to './'.

manifest_path.description: Plugin-only. Path to plugin.yaml. Defaults to './plugin.yaml'.
